message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run

187 tracked artifact JSON files updated as the result of a fresh local
suite run. The diff is pure regeneration noise (no behavioral change):

- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json — generated_at_unix_ms timestamps advance
  ~37 minutes; passed/total/failed case counts unchanged (e.g.
  e2e_adversarial_fixture_suite still 41/41 pass).
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json — ts_utc_unix_ms only.
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-{core,interpreters,trace,conformance,ad,
  dispatch}/*.json — per-test timestamps; no schema or status diffs.
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json — run_id /
  started_at / finished_at / per-gate timestamps; failure-summary
  text and counts unchanged (4 failed / synthetic).

These files are committed by repo convention (see prior
"chore(artifacts): refresh test logs ..." commits) so the tracked
working tree stays in sync with the latest deterministic run, keeping
diffs against future suite output meaningful.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
